sections.paragraph:
verb לשקוט

be still, silent

verb להשקיט

to hush, silence

verb הושקט

be hushed, silenced

adjective

silent, quiet, quiescent, noiseless, peaceful, placid, pacific, restful, serene, sedate, retired, halcyon, mousy

masculine noun

silence, quiescence, peace, hush, mum, muteness, noiselessness, placidity, placidness, quiescency, quietness, quietude, sereneness, serenity
